drag_drop_description: Drag and drop a Terraria .wld file from your computer into this page.
get_started_intro: Get started by doing one of the following:
if_no_spoilers: If you don't care about spoilers:
name: Name
open_folder_instruction: Click the <0/> button to select a folder that contains world and player map files from your computer.
open_world_instruction: Click the <0/> button to select a Terraria .wld file from your computer.
player_map_description: Pick a player map to avoid spoilers. TerraMap will show only what that player has seen in the world.
terramap_description: TerraMap is an interactive Terraria world map viewer.

themes.auto_description: Automatically change background and content based on your system settings and theme.

upload_warning: you may see a warning about Uploading files. The files are read in your browser and will not actually be uploaded anywhere.
world_files_location: Terraria world and player map files are usually located at (click to copy path):
world_loaded_description: Once a world file is loaded, you can pan and zoom the map, search for blocks & items, view chest contents, and more.
